sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7192" key="a)napida/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναπιδάω</orth>, <sense id="n7192.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">διαπιδάω</ref></xr>, prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg008:56:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Mete.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">56.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
